programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help more people trying to buy a home, beginning in west London. Newlyweds Keon and Zoe are looking for a family house in Shepherds Bush with space for their hobby of salsa dancing, but even with a budget of £450,000 this will be a challenge for Phil. Kirstie is scouting for properties in the borough of Richmond for Carolyn and Paul - a native of Sheffield who is struggling to get his head around Londons inflated prices

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam locks his keys in the bar by accident. He is unable to get into his apartment and sets about looking for somewhere to sleep for the night. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier decides to prove the people of Boston will fall for anything by persuading Woody to run for mayor. However, he has second thoughts about his plan as it becomes clear how far the unworldly barmans political career could go. Comedy, starring Kesley Grammer and Woody Harrelson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A drinking session loosens a few tongues and elicits the odd surprise, including Carlas confession of a passionate night with Paul. To help her get over the shame, Sam shares a big secret of his own. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert and Amy finally get married in the Barone family tradition. Brad Garrett and Monica Horan star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains she and Ray do not have any fun together - and persuades him to let her join him in his game of golf. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie tries to gain the upper hand in her relationship with new daughter-in-law Amy, but Debra is determined the latest Barone wife will not endure the kind of interference she has had to put up with

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz helps Frasier arrange a date between her mother and Martin, unaware they detest each other. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Sean Lock: Keep It Light
programme.desc: The 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown captain captured live on stage in a stand-up performance, talking about everything from the price of cinema food, accusations of him having a mid-life crisis, his behaviour on the internet and jewellery heists. From 2019

programme.title: Everybodys Talking About Jamie (2021)
programme.desc: Jamie New celebrates his 16th birthday with a gift of glittery red heels from his supportive mother, Margaret. Nurturing a dream of performing on stage, Jamie recruits Hugo Battersby aka drag doyenne Loco Chanelle as his mentor to step confidently into the spotlight. Comedy drama, starring Max Harwood, Richard E Grant, Sarah Lancashire, Lauren Patel and Shobna Gulati

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Anglers Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Anglesey, where best pals Richard Tuke and Susan Hatch hope to show that Blackthorn Farm BandB, which they own, is better than any of their guests establishments. However, they find that their close friendship is scrutinised even more than their property

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The White Swan Hotel in Yeadon, West Yorkshire, is the second stop of the competition, and owners Graham and Barbara Yellow hope their basic facilities and affordable prices will please their guests. Spiritual couple Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor get good vibes from their room, Rachel Lonergan views the hosts in a new light and breakfast is well received by the contestants, despite having to pay a supplement fee

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Vegetarians Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor host at the Old Mill House BandB in Bridport, Dorset, and both come under attack at dinner when Malcolm voices his opinions on meat eating. In the morning, a meditation session gets a mixed response, and most of the guests are left cold by the vegetarian buffet breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Rachel and Dan Lonergan welcome their guests to the Brighton Inn, East Sussex, where they hope to offer a luxury, boutique experience. Malcolm and Fiona Piers-Taylor give their room a thorough inspection, before the groups learns the art of building a human pyramid in the afternoons activity. At breakfast, they discover a lack of vegetarian alternatives, and the hosts suspect game-playing when they are shocked by some negative feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together to confront their rivals and find out how much they have been paid. Richard and Susan are keen to tackle the bathroom issues of Barbara and Graham, who bask in the comments from Malcolm and Fiona. The Old Mill House proprietors defend their vegetarian breakfast routine, but serve up snobby feedback to Rachel and Dan from the Brighton Inn

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie decide to try for a baby - but with Arthur under their feet, finding time alone proves difficult. The delivery driver keeps the old man occupied by hiring a dog walker to listen to his stories about the Second World War. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug treats Carrie to laser eye surgery for her birthday - but the side effects leave her blind for a week, and shes not happy to learn her husband chose the cheapest doctor he could find

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs colleagues resent his achievement in breaking the record for perfect deliveries, while Carrie wonders why the dog walker enjoys spending time with her father. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra is too ill to take Ally to a pyjama party, so Ray reluctantly agrees to do the honours. Unfortunately it means coming face to face with Peggy, an old enemy who physically assaulted him during a charity event

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra wonders how Ray would cope if she met an untimely end, and picks an attractive friend to replace her as his new wife - but cannot help being hurt by his enthusiastic response to the idea

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra throws a bridal shower for Amy, but Marie tries to take over and monopolises the event. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris tries to woo Niles with anonymous presents, but Frasier thinks the gifts were intended for him and risks his latest relationship to learn the identity of his secret admirer. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niless expensive divorce leaves him penniless, forcing him to move into Frasier and Martins apartment. Comedy, starring David Hyde Pierce and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: The Seal Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier prepare for a dinner party at Mariss beach house, but a bizarre turn of events results in them having to devote all their time to disposing of a dead seal that has washed up on the shore

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets a fellow horse-lover, but then falls in with a circle of snooty girls, while Homer takes Marge on a romantic cruise

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Part one of two. A charismatic new preacher comes to town and shakes things up at church, but Reverend Lovejoy fights back by investigating the mans mysterious past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Part two of two. Reverend Lovejoy discovers the real reason Bode came to Springfield and it remains to be seen if the congregation will continue to accept him

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Becketts in Southsea, Portsmouth, where parking problems, a duvet disaster and a noisy night leave host Terence facing less than perfect scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at the Westby Guest House in Boscombe, where Duncan and Jessies strict house rules are not to everyones liking - and the breakfast is quality over quantity

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul and Tracey host the third visit of the week at Newell Restaurant and Rooms in Sherborne, Dorset. Terence is taken with the blissful bedding but Duncan has a substandard slumber - and a communal coffee zone proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the final visit of the week, the BandBers embrace the great outdoors at Lydcott Glamping in Cornwall. Hosts Emma and Rich think their cabins will set them on the path to victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet up on payment day to settle their differences. In a particularly emotional discussion, there is plenty of finger pointing before the payments are revealed

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Hamilton, Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer dive headfirst into a domestic battleground with warring couple Scott and Jaqui. Their once-perfect four-bedroom new-build, which they bought 14 years ago when their two daughters were still at home, now feels like a misfit. With the kids now gone, the house no longer works and is causing consternation. Scott, who works from home full-time, is fiercely attached to his beloved office, double garage and the local area, and refuses to entertain the idea of leaving. Meanwhile, Jaqui is at her wits end with the cramped kitchen and lack of space for entertaining. Shes convinced their dream home is out there, and shes desperately relying on Phil to get Scott on board. Kirstie faces a Herculean challenge, working with a £60,000 Love It budget to create the extra space Jaqui craves. Meanwhile, Phil navigates treacherous waters, searching for properties to meet Jaquis high standards and somehow persuade Scott that selling up is the best option - all within a £450,000 List It budget. With emotions running high and compromises in short supply, its an epic showdown. Wholl come out on top?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Two sets of house-hunters look for properties in north London. Kirstie Allsopp is with single mum and businesswoman Digi, who has £1.25million to find the perfect place for her, daughter Emily and mum Queelan. However, it soon proves a challenge to find the family home that suits all their needs. Phil Spencer helps Rebecca and Sohail, who have raised their family in rented accommodation and now want a place of their own now. The problem is finding a place they will love when their rental is worth at least £200,000 more than their budget to buy

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wifes death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour
programme.desc: Part two of two. Howard Carter returns to Tutankhamuns tomb and the boy kings death mask captivates the world. Meanwhile, Egypts rulers insist that all treasures remain in the country. Archaeologists rush to uncover the next Tutankhamun, but nothing comes close until extraordinary treasures are uncovered at Tanis. However, as the world goes to war, the race for ancient Egypt is paused

programme.title: The Roman Empire by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Alice heads to Tarragona, once the capital of Iberian Rome, which boasts the largest Roman forum in the world and a vast amphitheatre unearthed below a church. In Cartagena, on Spains south coast, Alice marvels at the areas subterranean riches and takes a skylift above the city to reflect on the many things her 1300-mile Roman odyssey has taught her

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill heads north to Hanoi, Vietnams capital, to explore the countrys complex relationship with life, death and war. On the shores of the Red River Delta, Bill discovers a culture defined by spirituality, femininity and a unique tradition for honouring the dead. In celebrating those he has lost, Bill finds a way to pay homage to the most important figures in his own life

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Infinity Pool (2023)
programme.desc: James and Em Foster are enjoying an all-inclusive beach vacation on the island of La Tolqa. However, a fatal accident exposes the resorts perverse subculture of hedonistic tourism, reckless violence and surreal horrors. Horror mystery, starring Alexander Skarsgard, Mia Goth, Cleopatra Coleman and Thomas Kretschmann

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isnt what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: With the final getting ever closer, the handcuffed couples face a new challenge: their first holiday away together. Jonathan Ross sends them across the UK on iconic British breaks, from beautiful canal trips to camping in the wild countryside, and enjoying all the fun of the fair at the great British seaside. On neutral territory, and without friends and family around, how do they cope with just their cuff-partner for company?

programme.title: Stacey Solomons Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Newlyweds Shariqa and Imani have struggled to keep their renovation project on schedule or on budget in Cambridgeshire. They dream of transforming their characterless 1970s semi-detached home into a timeless, classy home with a period feel. But with just £10,000 to add a kitchen and transform the ground floor, Stacey has her work cut out. To help Shariqa and Imani get over the line, she encourages them to take on ambitious DIY tasks, including tiling with tricky marble tiles, creating their own panelling and building flat-pack kitchen units. Stacey also brings them money-saving design ideas from colour suggestions to clever hacks using off-the-shelf items to create bespoke built-in furniture. At Pickle Cottage, Stacey takes the plunge to learn new plumbing skills as part of her project to upgrade an indoor-outdoor space shes doing up in her own home

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer try to solve the problems of first-time buyers in north London. Kirstie tries to end the house-hunting misery of Ify Okoye, who has viewed 90 properties without success. Meanwhile, Phil assists a couple looking to settle down in England after six years abroad - but discovers their ambitions may put their budget under serious strain

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug smashes into Kelly and Deacons car, causing untold damage and a war of words on what should have been a pleasant evening out. Meanwhile, Kirby teases Spence when he discovers he has an allergy to nuts. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is invited to a company gathering, where Doug impresses the other lawyers partners with tales of his fictitious mountaineering exploits. Back at home, Arthur wrecks their bedroom and enlists Deacons help in repairing the damage before they return

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decorates the house for Halloween against Arthurs wishes - and then regrets it when the old man has a heart attack. Meanwhile, Deacon wants to buy a comic-book character costume for his son, but is frustrated to find there arent any black superheroes. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Robert asks if he can borrow the suitcase sitting on the stairway landing, Ray explains he and Debra have been locked in a two-week battle of wills over who is responsible for putting the item away. Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Marie shame Ray into giving Robert a second bachelor party to make up for his disappointing first attempt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robert and Amy prepare to tie the knot in a classic Barone family wedding ceremony - but the groom becomes suspicious when his future brother-in-law Peter tries to make peace with both him and Ray. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Unemployed Roz is reduced to borrowing money from Frasier, but he thinks she is spending it irresponsibly. Meanwhile, rumours circulate that KACL is rehiring staff. Comedy, starring Peri Gilpin and Kelsey Grammer

programme.desc: Monica agonises over whether Rachel or Phoebe should be her maid of honour, and leaves the pair to sort it out between themselves. She also bumps into Chandlers ex-girlfriend Julie, and is horrified to discover he ended their relationship because she became fat

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Library Book
programme.desc: Janice cajoles Chandler and Monica into inviting her to the wedding. Ross discovers a surprising fact about his doctoral dissertation and the position it occupies in the university library, and Joeys latest date causes him emotional turmoil. Guest starring Kristin Davis (Sex and the City)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesnt Like Dogs
programme.desc: Rachels assistant Tag spends Thanksgiving with the gang, leading to a series of embarrassing revelations, and a puppy smuggled into the flat by Phoebe unnerves Chandler. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel gets a dressing-down at work for dating Tag, while Monica tries to buy her neighbours friendship by making sweets for them - but finds their appetites to be greater than her desire to be popular

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Phoebe plans to return to her flat and tries desperately to persuade Rachel to join her, while Monica is infuriated by Chandlers inability to tip appropriately. Ross looks after Ben during the holiday season, and dresses as an armadillo to keep him entertained

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Cheesecakes
programme.desc: Phoebes ex-boyfriend arrives back in town and Monica is angry at not being invited to her cousins wedding. Chandler and Rachel feel guilty for eating a neighbours cheesecake that was mistakenly delivered to their apartment. Comedy, guest starring Hank Azaria (The Simpsons)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Theyre Up All Night
programme.desc: Ross and Joey get trapped on the roof while waiting to watch a meteor shower. Monicas exhaustion leads to trouble with Chandler, and Rachel argues with Tag over which of them failed to post a parcel

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe encounters a suicidal office worker during her first day as a telemarketer. Ross and Monica are upset to discover their parents intend to sell their childhood home, while Rachel and Chandler blame themselves for breaking Joeys favourite chair

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: The pals celebrate Rachels 30th birthday and reminisce about their own, including Monicas attempt to hide her intoxication from her parents, and Rosss embarrassing crisis, which resulted in the purchase of a red sports car. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joeys New Brain
programme.desc: Joey tells a fellow soap cast member that her character is to be killed off. Rachel and Phoebe sabotage each others plans to date an attractive man who left his mobile phone in Central Perk, and Ross learns he is not allowed to play the bagpipes at Monica and Chandlers wedding. Guest starring Susan Sarandon

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Truth About London
programme.desc: Chandler hears a startling revelation about how his relationship with Monica almost failed to get off the ground in London. Joey tries to get ordained via the internet and Rachel teaches Ben practical jokes to play on Ross. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Joey and Ross date the same girl, while Monica fights tooth and nail with a fellow bride-to-be for a special wedding dress and the right to hire Chandlers favourite band for the ceremony. David Schwimmer and Courteney Cox star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is nominated for a minor daytime drama award, Monica realises she will never again feel the thrill of a new romance and a student tells Ross he is in love with him. With Matt LeBlanc and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Ross and Monicas Cousin
programme.desc: Monica is visited by a cousin she has not seen since childhood, whose stunning looks do not go unnoticed by Chandler. Rachel and Phoebe plan a last-minute bridal party, while Joey tries to trick his way into an acting role. Guest starring Denise Richards

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel meets an old college friend and wonders whether she should confront her about a boozy incident from their past that took a dramatic and passionate turn. Meanwhile, Chandler and Ross vie to outdo one another in the tuxedo stakes for the impending wedding. Winona Ryder guest stars

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: With the wedding only four weeks away, Chandler struggles to write his vows and turns to Joey and Ross for much-needed help. Meanwhile, Monica has similar difficulties and recruits Phoebe and Rachel - but they soon get distracted and start reminiscing

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica convinces a reluctant Chandler to travel to Las Vegas to invite his estranged father to their wedding, while Rachel gets into trouble for driving Monicas Porsche. Comedy, guest starring Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Maverick (1994)
programme.desc: Wisecracking gambler Bret Maverick and con artist Annabelle Bransford cheat their way across the Wild West to make the money they need to enter a high-stakes, once-in-a-century poker tournament, with a ruthless rival on their trail and a principled lawman as an unlikely travelling companion. Comedy Western, starring Mel Gibson and Jodie Foster, with James Garner, star of the original TV series, alongside Graham Greene and James Coburn

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Pop twins Jedward, TV presenter Lorraine Kelly, writer Charlie Brooker and comedian Micky Flanagan join team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson to answer questions based on opinion polls carried out around the country. Comedy panel show, presented by Jimmy Carr

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Extended edition. Jack Dee, Kelly Osbourne, Micky Flanagan and Jamelia join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Dom from Hampshire has been nominated for the show by his mum, in a desperate attempt to break his dismal dating record. Dom wants to find a partner who shares his love of adventure and isnt bothered by his posh boy charm. Theres also 22-year-old pansexual Izzy, who is open to dating any gender, but with so much on offer, will she make the right choice?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on programmes including My Mum, Your Dad, Welcome to Wrexham, Love and Death, Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden, Animals Up Close with Bertie Gregory, Puzzling with Lucy Worsley and This Morning. From September 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Great British Bake Off, Strictly Come Dancing, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, Sex Education, Blankety Blank, Celebrity Race Across the World, Love and Death, and Ambulance

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam unintentionally lets it slip that Barry never completed his community service requirement. Erica makes plans for her and Geoff to follow The Grateful Dead all summer, while Barry and his friends graduate from high school.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly insists the family take a road trip to go on vacation to Disneyland before Erica and Barry go off to college. Erica worries about her relationship with Geoff when he tells her they need to talk. Comedy, guest starring Christie Brinkley

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Brick Hotel in Newtown, Pennsylvania, where the staff have had enough of owner Verindar, who runs the establishment like an angry tyrant. Can Gordon convince her to value her loyal workers and entice customers back to this landmark hotel?

programme.desc: Amit Kleinberger, the CEO and co-owner of frozen yoghurt chain Menchies, poses as a participant in a reality TV contest to find out whether consistency is being maintained in his stores. The company has experienced rapid growth and Amit tries to establish what changes must be made to become a billion-dollar business

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Luton, Bedfordshire, battle it out in the culinary contest, beginning with Bridget and her husband Peter, whose menu of tried and tested dinner party favourites leaves their rivals distinctly unimpressed. Next to host are Shawn and Kendra, who prepare dishes based on their travels, before serving up a dessert that reflects their Canadian heritage. Finally, footballer Richard and his fiancee Marina decide to cook an Italian-inspired meal - but Richard proves to be more of a hindrance than a help in the kitchen. With the trio of parties complete, the couples reconvene to decide which pair hosted the best event

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The doubles version of the culinary challenge series heads to north Devon, where busy parents Matt and Sarah are the first hosts, but their decision to serve crisps as canapes does not go down well with some of their rivals. Next up are competitive foodies James and Laura, who put together a similar menu to their predecessors - but with more flair. The final party is thrown by am-dram couple Jake and Ian, and their guests have high expectations that the pairs mushroom bruschetta starter and casserole main look set to miss

programme.desc: Ned Flanders resigns as coach of Springfields junior football team, so Homer takes his place - and tries to make up for his own childhood shortcomings on the sports field by giving Bart the role of star quarterback. Featuring the guest voices of Joe Namath and Mike Judge

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Apus mother arrives in Springfield to organise his arranged marriage to the daughter of a family friend, but he is unwilling to have his future decided for him and pretends he already has a wife - Marge

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level (2019)
programme.desc: Players of Jumanji return, but as they attempt to rescue one of their own, they will have to brave parts unknown from arid deserts to snowy mountains, to escape the worlds most dangerous game. Director Jake Kasdans fantasy adventure sequel to his 2017 rebooted hit Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: A bus ride from New Delhi takes the teams to the second leg of the race, Indias city of love, Agra, where their first task is to deliver traditional chai tea to some office workers. Next, in a choice between two challenges, the duos must either wash laundry by hand in the Yamuna River or create bricks from a surprising source - cow dung

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggies godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. However, John Wick does receive support from Sofia, a fellow dog lover, assassin and manager of Casablancas Continental Hotel. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Michael McIntyres The Wheel, Love is Blind, Strictly Come Dancing, Boiling Point, HELP! My House is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Big Brother: The Launch, Dont Look Down for SU2C, Antiques Roadshow, Coronation Street, Big Little Journeys, Beat the Chasers Celebrity Special and Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg. From October 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 19-year-old student Marlie from Yorkshire, who keeps choosing the bad boys - which is driving her mum mad. Theres also 30-year-old Adam, from Bradford. Having previously had his heart broken, he is now looking for a woman with no secrets, and believes that if the contestants are willing to bare all on TV, they probably have nothing to hide

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Lucas faces a tough decision in order to protect himself from his dangerous cellmate and Warren is determined to uncover the truth, no matter the cost. While Tony and Diane head to London for answers, Doms left holding the fort, but the teens have other plans. Ste returns to devastating news, a revelation leaves Warren seething, and tensions flare at The Loft. Meanwhile, when a text lands in the wrong hands, a resident is faced with a tough parenting dilemma

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by friend and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, riding around Jersey on mini motorbikes while exploring the islands culinary delights. James samples one of Jerseys most famous exports - the Jersey Royal potato - which he uses to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark gets a lesson in oyster shucking and James uses Jersey black butter to create a black butter tartlet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers put their twist on the classic pavlova and take on a toffee technical, before creating showpiece that involves wrapping a delicate dessert in intricately patterned sponge. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: On the next leg of his Islands to Highlands tour, James travels to Devon where he meets his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by friend and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, riding around Jersey on mini motorbikes while exploring the islands culinary delights. James samples one of Jerseys most famous exports - the Jersey Royal potato - which he uses to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark gets a lesson in oyster shucking and James uses Jersey black butter to create a black butter tartlet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve new contestants make their way into the famous tent, hoping they have what it takes to bake their way to the final. They start off with cake week, and a signature challenge in which they must produce 12 mini rolls, before working out the recipe for a nostalgic teatime classic in the technical. For the showstopper, the bakers are asked to express their creativity with cakes designed to defy the laws of physics. Presented by Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Its crunch time for the bakers as biscuit week arrives and they are asked to produce their take on filled brandy snaps, followed by a jammy childhood favourite in the technical challenge. In the showstopper, they have to come up with an interactive toy made entirely from biscuit. Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas find out who will be top cookie and who will crumble under the pressure, while Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith judge their efforts

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding present as the amateurs demonstrate their bread-baking skills, putting their own twist on a classic Italian focaccia in the signature challenge and making a Greek-inspired snack in the technical. On day two, judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith task them with creating an artistic showpiece rendering decorative designs in milk bread. Who will be leaving the tent this week?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Matt Lucas host dessert week, which sees the amateur bakers put their twist on the classic pavlova and take on a toffee technical, before creating showpiece that involves wrapping a delicate dessert in intricately patterned sponge. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be leaving the tent this week

They also visit Malton and Whitby, before preparing a final dish back in Scarborough - a beer and miso BBQ chicken with grilled, marinated aubergine

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The girls and Charles decide to surprise Caroline with a second honeymoon. When Grace Snider cannot make it, Mr Edwards volunteers for the job of looking after the children. Later on, he finds the Ingalls girls, especially Carrie, to be more than he can handle. Meanwhile, Caroline cannot stop thinking about the children and worrying for their safety

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Miss Beadle is injured and ordered to rest by Doc Baker, so Caroline takes over as substitute teacher of Walnut Grove School. During her tenure, an uneducated youth named Abel McKay enrolls, and is relentlessly teased because of his illiteracy

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary gives Laura a baby raccoon as a pet, but it bites both her and the family dog, leaving Charles worried it may have rabies

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The church needs a new bell, creating tension between the Kennedys and the Olesons

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary is forbidden from taking a scholarship exam after she accidentally sets fire to the barn, but Laura fears she will defy their mother

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jealous of Charles attention for his new son, Laura longs for her fathers affections and refuses to pray for her baby brother to get well when he falls ill

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Ingalls family is delighted by the birth of a new baby boy, Charles Fredrick. Laura becomes jealous and refuses to pray for her new brothers good health. The young boy dies soon afterwards and she is racked with guilt

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Christmas comes around, all the Ingalls are caught up in the secrecy and excitement. Charles and Mary take secret jobs to obtain a gift for their loved ones. Laura meanwhile is left out of the fun when she cant find anything to give or any way to raise money. While she succeeds in making the Christmas a memorable experience for everybody by selling her beloved horse Bunny to Nels Oleson so she can buy Ma a stove. Carrie remembers the true meaning of Christmas

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nels Oleson has had it up to here with Harriets snobbish, meddlesome behaviour, particularly toward the Ingalls family. Mrs Oleson doesnt take kindly to her husbands old-school beliefs, either. The two get into a huge argument and decide to separate. This sends the Ingalls and the Olesons other friends to intervene and convince them to settle their differences

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker falls in love with Harriet Olesons visiting niece, but fears his age may ruin his chances of a happy relationship

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A typhus outbreak sweeps Walnut Grove and several people become critically ill. The Ingalls family is spared, but Charles is not so lucky when he is exposed. The church is set up as a makeshift hospital-morgue, while Charles, Doc Baker and Reverend Alden, all quarantined with the illness, search for the source of the disease

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A travelling medicine salesman arrives in town claiming to be able to heal anything, but he faces condemnation when Mrs Oleson becomes seriously ill. Red Buttons guest stars

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Walnut Grove community intervenes after a badly beaten boy is found unconscious on the floor of his cabin, the victim of his fathers drunken rage

programme.title: The Ruth Rendell Mysteries

programme.desc: An elderly relative comes to stay and annoys the family, who urge her to leave. When John-Boy learns she is dying, he decides she should spend her last days with them

programme.desc: The girls and Charles decide to surprise Caroline with a second honeymoon. When Grace Snider cannot make it, Mr Edwards volunteers for the job of looking after the children. programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Miss Beadle is injured and ordered to rest by Doc Baker, so Caroline takes over as substitute teacher of Walnut Grove School. During her tenure, an uneducated youth named Abel McKay enrolls, and is relentlessly teased because of his illiteracy

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary gives Laura a baby raccoon as a pet, but it bites both her and the family dog, leaving Charles worried it may have rabies

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The church needs a new bell, creating tension between the Kennedys and the Olesons

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary is forbidden from taking a scholarship exam after she accidentally sets fire to the barn, but Laura fears she will defy their mother

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jealous of Charles attention for his new son, Laura longs for her fathers affections and refuses to pray for her baby brother to get well when he falls ill

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Ingalls family is delighted by the birth of a new baby boy, Charles Fredrick. Laura becomes jealous and refuses to pray for her new brothers good health. The young boy dies soon afterwards and she is racked with guilt

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When Christmas comes around, all the Ingalls are caught up in the secrecy and excitement. Charles and Mary take secret jobs to obtain a gift for their loved ones. Laura meanwhile is left out of the fun when she cant find anything to give or any way to raise money. While she succeeds in making the Christmas a memorable experience for everybody by selling her beloved horse Bunny to Nels Oleson so she can buy Ma a stove. Carrie remembers the true meaning of Christmas

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Nels Oleson has had it up to here with Harriets snobbish, meddlesome behaviour, particularly toward the Ingalls family. Mrs Oleson doesnt take kindly to her husbands old-school beliefs, either. The two get into a huge argument and decide to separate. This sends the Ingalls and the Olesons other friends to intervene and convince them to settle their differences

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker falls in love with Harriet Olesons visiting niece, but fears his age may ruin his chances of a happy relationship

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A typhus outbreak sweeps Walnut Grove and several people become critically ill. The Ingalls family is spared, but Charles is not so lucky when he is exposed. The church is set up as a makeshift hospital-morgue, while Charles, Doc Baker and Reverend Alden, all quarantined with the illness, search for the source of the disease

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A travelling medicine salesman arrives in town claiming to be able to heal anything, but he faces condemnation when Mrs Oleson becomes seriously ill. Red Buttons guest stars

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Walnut Grove community intervenes after a badly beaten boy is found unconscious on the floor of his cabin, the victim of his fathers drunken rage

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Steven is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham with multiple life-threatening injuries to his head, eye and chest after a 22-foot wall collapsed on him. Teenager Coby has crashed his motocross bike at speed, and seven-year-old Layla-Rose has fallen off her bike and smashed her front teeth

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham are concerned that an 80-year-old man who fell out of bed and hurt his head may have incurred brain injuries. Other patients include a 22-year-old professional carer who has been brought into AandE after collapsing at work and a man who trapped his finger in a container. Plus, nurse Jess talks about her stammer

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A womans face is visibly drooped on one side, and she cant raise her arm. The paramedics suspect she may be having a stroke - a time-critical emergency. A teenager has pain in her side and is finding it difficult to breathe. It could be a kidney infection or a sign of something more serious. A young woman who has had a seizure is drowsy and disorientated. As the paramedics try to find out why, the frequency of her seizures suddenly increases

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Steven is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham with multiple life-threatening injuries to his head, eye and chest after a 22-foot wall collapsed on him. Teenager Coby has crashed his motocross bike at speed, and seven-year-old Layla-Rose has fallen off her bike and smashed her front teeth

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: On the second da in Porto, bridge worker Lou takes the gang off-roading in dirt buggies before they all head out on a fancy-dress beer bike cruise. The booze and the laughs flow freely but Lou seems to have forgotten to arrange dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Village Limits in Woodhall Spa, Lincolnshire, where owner David Coulam and best friend Kim Goodman hope their quirky rooms will propel them to victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Old Mill in Yarm in the Tees Valley, where mother and daughter Zoe and Mea Walton hope to win over their rivals with the life of luxury. The guests are impressed, although the extra cost for the deluxe room, with its own hot tub, does not wash well with Spencer and Gavin

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals spend a night at the Elan Hotel in Rhayader, Powys, where Martin McDaid and Iris Anderson provide plenty of chat and a no-frills approach. However, Spencer and Gavin are not big fans of going back to basics, the rooms lack the wow factor for the guests and a deluge of dust leaves Spencer feeling wiped out

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Royal Oak Inn, in Luxborough, Somerset, run by Spencer Braydon-Phillips, who is joined in the competition by his good friend Gavin Rees. The guests arrive to the 14th-century inn with high expectations, but are shocked to find the standards to be fairly ordinary. In the bar, competition talk turns tense and boiler troubles overnight pour cold water on the guests stays.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition finds the hosts meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. The guests rifle through their feedback, from troubles over breakfast hampers and hot tub rooms to interesting decor decisions. One hosts tit-for-tat approach also comes under scrutiny. The BandBers also get to the bottom of why one guest refused a return visit. After strong opinions are aired and differences debated, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman jets off to Portugals Silver Coast to help mum and daughter Maria and Jess find their dream holiday home. Maria, who is originally from Lisbon, has been living in the UK for almost 40 years but now wants a holiday home that her children and grandchildren can enjoy whenever they like. With a budget of £130,000, Ben shows them five fantastic properties, but will any of them be up Maria and Jess street?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies heads to Lot-et-Garonne in south-west France to help a Hertfordshire couple find their perfect forever home on a budget of £200,000. Project manager Chris and retired teaching assistant Jane are planning a permanent move to France with their dog Loki, and theyre looking for a detached house on the edge of a small village

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Clergyman Ken is planning a permanent move to the district of Larnaca in Cyprus, and hes asked his good friend Katie to help him with the search. Hes been visiting friends in Cyprus for years and, now that hes retired from his role as a prison chaplain, he thinks its the perfect time to move closer to them. With a budget of £80,000, Jasmine Harman is tasked with finding him the perfect place. She has five properties up her sleeve but will any of them be the answer to Father Kens prayers?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Leeds, where the first to host is 24-year-old digital account manager Alice. Alice has never held a dinner party before, but shes hoping her family favourites will hit the spot and win her the £1,000 prize. Shes hoping to impress Danielle, Andy, Lynne and Matt. With gob-smacking revelations, cringe-worthy party tricks and a ginormous Pavlova, can Alice manage to walk away with the honours?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Night two of the competition in Leeds, and company director Andy hopes to win with a menu of restaurant-inspired fare, but Alice and Danielle are more impressed with his Ferrari

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fun-loving student Danielle hosts the third dinner party in Leeds, hoping a high-calorie menu will see her emerge victorious. She even serves dessert wearing her wedding dress

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Theatre technician Matt is the fourth to host in Leeds with a menu of family favourites - and if that does not win them over, hopefully his juggling skills will do the trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final day of the competition in and around Leeds, and jeweller Lynne hopes her night will sparkle with a menu consisting of her own creations. While talk at the table turns to plastic surgery and Botox, Andy and Danielle arent too impressed with Lynnes food

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Trap Inn in Broomhill, Northumberland, here guests take an afternoons boat trip to visit an island populated by puffins

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB rivals spend the night at the Newholme Hotel in Blackpool, where married couple Nigel Dixon and Damian Bailey hope their combination of budget prices with high-end touches will prove popular. However, Meg and Yvonne find an unwelcome surprise in the loo, and conversations in the afternoon shine a light on some growing tensions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Liz Parker and Tracey Welch welcome their rivals to Portsonachan Hotel and Lodges in Argyll and Bute. The guests are wowed by the views but dirty discoveries dampen their delight

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to Lamlash Bay Hotel on the Isle of Arran, owned by Meg El Adm. As former cabin crew, Meg hopes her customer service will help her to fly the winners plaque home. The guests are pleased with the panoramic view and tantalised by the tasteful touches. That evening, over drinks, Nyoami and Joe question if the group will still be friends after the payments have been revealed. When it comes to the guests reviews, a follicle failure puts an end to faultless feedback for the hosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests rifle through the feedback, from Meg and Yvonnes lavatory let-down to Nyoamis fiddled French toast. Meanwhile, Meg wants to know why her tea tray wasnt everyones cup of tea. After the hosts have debated their differences, the payments are revealed and the weeks winner is announced

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Adam is brought in by ambulance after being involved in a high-speed motorcycle accident. The injured 20-year-old joined by his dad and sister. Meanwhile, Richard, aged 70, arrives at AandE with a high heart rate, and 10-year-old Pia is brought in by her mum after falling over and hurting her knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Single father Gary, 47, is put in a medically induced coma at Kings College Hospital to reduce the risk of brain damage following a serious motorcycle accident, and 69-year-old Steve confronts his fear of needles when a nurse has to remove a fishbone stuck in his finger. Meanwhile, 58-year-old lung cancer patient Terry is in AandE with his carer Sandy, a year after being given two weeks to live

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at Londons Kings College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman who has to dial 999 because of pains in her chest and shortness of breath. When a patient is found unresponsive at home and with no reaction to pain, a second crew is called as she needs to be urgently transported to hospital. A patient with low blood pressure is found on the kitchen floor. She needs to go to hospital but its her mothers funeral tomorrow and shes refusing to go

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A mans tongue swells to twice its normal size, and a postal worker who walks 15 miles a day is on the floor unable to move with painful spasms in his back. An intoxicated patient verbally abuses one of the paramedics, an ECG tracing reveals that a patient is having a heart attack, and a man receiving chemotherapy is running a high temperature and may have developed sepsis

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Single father Gary, 47, is put in a medically induced coma at Kings College Hospital to reduce the risk of brain damage following a serious motorcycle accident, and 69-year-old Steve confronts his fear of needles when a nurse has to remove a fishbone stuck in his finger. Meanwhile, 58-year-old lung cancer patient Terry is in AandE with his carer Sandy, a year after being given two weeks to live

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at Londons Kings College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Michelle plans a day at the beach but unexpectedly ends up taking the gang high into the mountains for a day of impromptu abseiling and zipwiring. A day of tantrums and tears may spell disaster for the grandmother from Birmingham

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Edinburgh, the first host is 37-year-old Canadian comedian Larah, who hopes to bag herself the prize with a night of fine dining. She aims to impress 38-year-old pilot James, 37-year-old cafe owner Nutan, 26-year-old salesman Sindiso and 42-year-old security manager Anne

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night from the competition in Edinburgh, and cafe owner Nutan is hoping her happy-go-lucky attitude will have her laughing all the way to the bank

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Edinburgh is South-African born family man Sindiso, who hopes an evening of fun inspired by his homeland will win him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Edinburgh security company manager Anne hopes her homely, relaxed night in will be enough to win the £1,000 prize - but rising tensions between the guests may scupper her chances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Edinburgh, and pilot James is hoping a touch of sophistication in his high-flying menu will see him land safely in first place. However, after the previous nights tension, his main concern is keeping any potential explosions contained. Guests Anne and Larah have a suspicion he could be serious competition. Will James manage to produce excellent food and keep the peace, leading him to victory?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Kay and Barry have decided its time to fulfil their dream of buying a holiday home in the historic city of Jerez in southern Spain. With a budget of £105,000, they want an apartment close to all the action. Jasmine Harman lines up five excellent properties for the pair to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps Lesley and Ken, who have downsized their house in the UK to free up some cash to buy a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Property expert Craig shows them the best of what their £350,000 budget can secure

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman helps Lian and Dave, a couple with a 13-year-old son, search for a holiday home in Spains Almería Province on a budget of £80,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps motorbike enthusiast Jennie look for a home on the western Costa del Sol. With a budget of £85,000, Laura lines up five impressive properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Lindleys from Ashtead, Surrey. Having built up his business empire from home, cyber security expert Bill has inadvertently taken over their detached bungalow, and retired civil servant Pippa has had enough. She dreams of moving to Kent, where they can be closer to family and the coast

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters searching the Reading area. Kirstie is with Chloe, who wants a place in the trendy suburb of Caversham, and is joined on her search by her father Clive. However, after two years of looking and 60 properties viewed, the pair are struggling. Phil teams up with teachers Richard and Jo, who need to find a family home before term starts. But it needs to be a property good enough to get Richard excited

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George kicks off a new series by paying a visit to solicitor Dawn, who is embarking on a mammoth renovation of her local village shop in Yorkshire, in a bid to turn it into a home for her and her two sons. But with a six-month deadline, no renovating experience and ambitious plans, including turning a storage room into an outdoor oasis, will her on paper plans work in the real world?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Sherbourne House Hotel in Attleborough, Norfolk, where some of the guests find the rooms a little too hot - resulting in some unwelcome feedback

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Holywell House in Loughborough, Leicestershire, where musical theatre lovers Lez Cope-Newman and Derek Hunter hope to win them over with a show-stopping stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: A visit to the Greyhound Hotel in Cromford, Derbyshire, where mother and daughter Tina and Danielle Waddingham are hoping their fellow BandBers will be roused by their renovations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Royal Hotel, in Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, where General Manager Vicki Hart and Events Manager Kara Cross hope to wow the guests with their boutique seafront hotel. Everyone laps up the luxury rooms, but in the evening, talk turns tense with accusations of foul play. In the morning, a noisy night and a dry shower cause troubles for Tina and Danielle. At breakfast, the sausages and bacon become a bone of contention for some guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The holiday hosts meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores. Feedback ranges from sleep issues and beef about breakfast bothers, to tabletop troubles and Dereks slumber sorrows. Strong opinions are aired and differences debated, before the winner is finally announced

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a woman whos passed out for the third time that day, and a man in his 40s with chest pain and a family history of heart failure that could be causing him anxiety. A man is found intoxicated and collapsed in the street, and a woman trips on some stairs and badly cuts her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is rushed in with suspected sepsis and his wife shares her experience as his full-time carer. Sixty-one-year-old Jillian comes in after a fall and recalls when her husband was diagnosed with stage four bowel cancer. Keith arrives with a fast heart rate and while staff urgently try to bring it down his wife talks about raising deaf children and being diagnosed with the deaf gene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Hospital staff at Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham treat three female university students who have been victims of a spate of needle-spiking attacks. Twenty year-old Kate is rushed in after collapsing in a nightclub and having to receive CPR from a friend when she stopped breathing normally. In the Urgent Treatment Unit 19 year-old Pavni and 21-year-old Sarah meet while waiting for treatment after what they suspect to be needle-spiking. While being treated Pavni talks about the racist abuse she faced growing up and Sarah reveals the impact COVID-19 has had on her university experience

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate stories connected to the Tower of London, looking at the contrasting fates of three people imprisoned in the Tower of London for treason. They examine what happened to Jesuit priest Fr John Gerard after he was accused of being sent by the pope to overthrow Elizabeth I, and look at the cases of Gunpowder Plot conspirator Guy Fawkes and German spy Josef Jakobs, who was captured in 1941 after breaking his ankle while parachuting into England on a mission

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Tudor historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate the history of the Tower of London, examining stories that challenge accepted beliefs about the infamous prison using original historical sources and dramatic reconstructions. Here they consider why it took executioner John Ketch five blows to decapitate the Duke of Monmouth in July 1685, and examine whether former inmate Lady Jane Grey had a legitimate claim to the English throne. They also look into how a ragtag gang managed to breach its defences during the Peasants Revolt in June 1381 and killed Simon of Sudbury, the Archbishop of Canterbury

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb and Joe Crowley examine the evidence and report on the intrigues that led to three royal deaths, detailing the sometimes salacious accusations levelled at Anne Boleyn, Catherine Howard and Lady Arabella Seymour. Henry VIIIs chief minister Thomas Cromwell informed the monarch of gossip about Anne and court musician Mark Smeaton, but allegations at her public trial included adultery with five men, incest with her brother George and treason. Rumours of relationships with distant cousin Francis Dereham and Thomas Culpeper led to Catherine Howards execution, while Lady Arabella, a serious threat to the ruling Stuart dynasty, is thought to have committed suicide against a backdrop of a cross-dressing noblewoman and two escapes from the Tower

programme.title: Worlds Worst Natural Disasters
programme.desc: Documentary in which experts formulate a list of the 10 most significant natural disasters of all time. From historic floods and destructive fires to violent earthquakes, they reveal the key moments that led to human catastrophes, and prove that when it comes to chaos, Mother Nature reigns supreme. The programme also suggests that man can learn from past events to minimise their impact if and when they strike again

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: Revenant Skeleton, Spy Cam, Shakespearean Mangle
programme.desc: An ancient skeleton found in Poland with a blade across its stomach, a stone on its neck and a strange green colour in its mouth? Plus, a beautiful golden capsule the size of a large beach ball that supposedly helped prevent Armageddon, and a bulky wooden device that could prove that Shakespeare didnt really write his masterworks

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate stories connected to the Tower of London, looking at the contrasting fates of three people imprisoned in the Tower of London for treason. They examine what happened to Jesuit priest Fr John Gerard after he was accused of being sent by the pope to overthrow Elizabeth I, and look at the cases of Gunpowder Plot conspirator Guy Fawkes and German spy Josef Jakobs, who was captured in 1941 after breaking his ankle while parachuting into England on a mission

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Tudor historian Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley investigate the history of the Tower of London, examining stories that challenge accepted beliefs about the infamous prison using original historical sources and dramatic reconstructions. Here they consider why it took executioner John Ketch five blows to decapitate the Duke of Monmouth in July 1685, and examine whether former inmate Lady Jane Grey had a legitimate claim to the English throne. They also look into how a ragtag gang managed to breach its defences during the Peasants Revolt in June 1381 and killed Simon of Sudbury, the Archbishop of Canterbury

programme.title: Bloody Tales of the Tower
programme.desc: Suzannah Lipscomb and Joe Crowley examine the evidence and report on the intrigues that led to three royal deaths, detailing the sometimes salacious accusations levelled at Anne Boleyn, Catherine Howard and Lady Arabella Seymour. Henry VIIIs chief minister Thomas Cromwell informed the monarch of gossip about Anne and court musician Mark Smeaton, but allegations at her public trial included adultery with five men, incest with her brother George and treason. Rumours of relationships with distant cousin Francis Dereham and Thomas Culpeper led to Catherine Howards execution, while Lady Arabella, a serious threat to the ruling Stuart dynasty, is thought to have committed suicide against a backdrop of a cross-dressing noblewoman and two escapes from the Tower

programme.title: Paris: Stories from the City
programme.desc: A look at the French capitals architectural journey, from its Roman roots and its construction on an island in the Seine, where the magnificent medieval churches Notre Dame and Saint Chapelle were built, to the secular policies of today. programme.sub-title: Are We at the Tipping Point?
programme.desc: Maiya May journeys across the United States to explore climate tipping points. Discovering how critical climate systems are for the planet?s stability, and learning the science behind these changes

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May visits the Isle de Jean Charles, Louisiana, one of the first communities in the United States to undergo a federally funded relocation due to climate change. She also learns about hurricanes from the Hurricane Hunters

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Examining the weapons used on different battlegrounds during the Second World War, scrutinising their design, production, performance and their role in victory or defeat. During land warfare, every weapon was made to fill a specific need. Designed for a single purpose: to win the race for technological supremacy over the enemy. From handguns to tanks, the stakes were never greater

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Exploring how naval warfare evolved from battleships to submarines, then into aircraft carriers and how pivotal battles in the Atlantic and Pacific hinged on megaship production. An examination of how control of supply lines shaped the war at sea

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: A look at how advancements in aeronautics and weaponry reshaped battle strategies in the Second World War, from bombers to fighters, witness the dawn of a new era as militaries vie for dominance in the skies

programme.title: War Machine: World War II
programme.desc: Investigating how crucial supply lines were in the Second World War for weapons, sustenance and medicine and how they defined the outcomes on the battlefield

programme.title: The Cure for Hate: Bearing Witness to Auschwitz
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on former skinhead and Holocaust denier Tony McAleer, who went on to become a founding member of the anti-hate activist group Life After Hate. Profoundly aware and deeply ashamed of the lineage of hate he once promoted, Tony visits the Auschwitz-Birkenau death camp in Poland in the spirit of tshuvah - to bear witness to the inconceivable ravages of the Holocaust, repent his wrongs, and deepen his personal work against the rise of extremist politics. Film-maker Peter Hutchison documents McAleers profoundly personal journey of atonement at Auschwitz

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Ken Burns documentary sin which the inhabitants of communities in Alabama, California, Connecticut and Minnesota recall the effects of the Second World War on their lives. It begins with the 12 months before the attack on Pearl Harbour, which belatedly brought their country into the conflict that cost the lives of more than 50 million people worldwide

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A Very Fearful Time: March 1942 - December 1942
programme.desc: Documentary examining how ordinary American citizens began to fear the worst when U-boats were found patrolling the United States east coast and few encouraging reports came through from early combat zones overseas, before the countrys navy finally started to halt Japans expansion in the Pacific

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: The Worst Is Yet to Come: January 1943 - June 1943
programme.desc: The documentary series examining the lives of four American communities during the Second World War continues, focusing on events that occurred one year after the US Army became involved in the conflict. Includes personal testaments and archive footage

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: When Things Get Tough: July 1943 - December 1943
programme.desc: Recalling the American airmen who took on daylight bombing missions over the heart of Hitlers Germany, targeting the enemy in their homeland in spite of terrible odds of survival

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The tiny Pacific atoll of Tarawa was occupied by the Japanese during World War Two, but was invaded by US Marines in November 1943. The programme recalls how after three days of intense fighting, and at a terrible cost to human life, the island was finally secured by the Americans

programme.title: War Machine: World War II

programme.desc: Jewellery expert Izzie Balmer and mid-century fan Mark Hill head to Wales for the start of a new trip in Pembrokeshire. Magic tricks and a folding cake stand head to auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer Day Two - Whats Occurring in South Wales?
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill meander through the towns and villages of Carmarthenshire searching for hidden gems in an assortment of antique shops to sell at auction

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 3
programme.desc: The journey takes Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer through the Midlands. Starting in Royal Wootton Bassett and making their way to Cirencester, they collect treasures and trinkets in Stroud and Ashchurch. Mark becomes determined to uncover a bit of bling and finds the perfect piece in the form of a 1950s modernist pendant, plus a striking Victorian kettle designed by Dr Christopher Dresser. Izzie, meanwhile, takes a chance on some unusual Czechoslovakian glass, a Royal Worcester cup and a 19th-century food container. The pair then head off to sell their finds in Market Harborough, Leicestershire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 4
programme.desc: Jewellery afficionado Izzie Balmer and 20th-century design and glassware connoisseur Mark Hill are back on the road in their classy 1987 Lotus Éclat, scouring Oxfordshire for treasures to take to auction. Mark sweeps past a 1930s model of Davy Crockett and splashes his cash instead on a Betjeman lockable decanter, a Doulton Lambeth inkwell and most of a Shelley drip ware coffee set. Izzie invests in a Minton majolica plate for serving strawberries, a set of French boutique display boxes and a tribal African babys hood

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mark Hill and Izzie Balmer - Day 5
programme.desc: The last leg of their journey sees Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill set out from Buckinghamshire seeking treasures to take to auction. Mark gets his paws on a mid-century teddy bear, while Izzie is hypnotised by early 20th-century glass commemorating Glasgows International Exhibition of 1901. Needless to say, only one of the pair can reign victorious after their final auction

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: EJ Osborne rescues a collection of car exhaust parts, a workbench and a metal table frame, before he and two others restyle them in the hope of making a profit for the owners

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades scours the recycling centre in Altrincham, Greater Manchester, in search of three skip-bound castoffs he can rework and repurpose. For his own project, Jay has a plant stand to spruce up

programme.title: Rik Mayall Presents
programme.desc: Romantic comedy from 1993, starring Rik Mayall. The night before his wedding, hapless Neil wakes up on a train to Scarborough with a stripper, thanks to his mischievous friends. Angry at first, hes desperate to get home in time to tie the knot with Sophie, but slowly comes to accept his fate. With Helena Bonham Carter, Nathaniel Parker, Martin Clunes and Serena Gordon

programme.title: Eskimo Nell (1975)
programme.desc: Filmmakers hired to make an erotic movie face challenges when their producer flees with funds, forcing them to secretly shoot multiple versions for different backers while dodging a censorship group. Slapstick comedy, starring Anna Quayle and Roy Kinnear.

programme.title: Bloodbath at the House of Death (1983)
programme.desc: Six scientists visit a country house that was once the site of a massacre to investigate psychic disturbances. They do not realise a short-tempered cult leader and his following of inept satanists have taken up residence, and intend to make sure no one leaves the estate alive. Horror spoof, starring Kenny Everett, Vincent Price and Pamela Stephenson

Comedy, starring Bartlett Mullins and Maggie Wright

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The four remaining contenders battle it out for a place in the Final. Firstly, they are asked to create a dish inspired by a place close to their heart. Imagination, technical excellence and delightful flavours are the order of the day as they endeavour to get judges Anna Haugh, Marcus Wareing and Gregg Wallace to buy-in to their sentiments through the taste of their food. Next, the chefs face a new and formidable challenge when they are asked to cook a show-stopping dish of their own creation for top food critics Jay Rayner, William Sitwell, Leyla Kazim, Jimi Famurewa and April Jackson. Then, the final four become the final three
