programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.sub-title: The House of Black and White
programme.desc: Arya arrives in Braavos, while Brienne and Pod run into trouble on the road, and Cersei fears for her daughters safety in Dorne as Ellaria Sand seeks revenge for her lover Oberyns death. Stannis has a proposal for Jon and an advisor tempts Daenerys. Fantasy drama, starring Maisie Williams, Lena Headey and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer (2013)
programme.desc: A farm boy accidentally rebuilds the link between the human world and a kingdom of man-eating giants in the sky, resulting in a princess being trapped in the monsters realm. He joins a band of the kings knights on a rescue mission, but one of the group intends to betray them in a bid to seize the throne. Fantasy adventure, starring Nicholas Hoult and Ewan McGregor

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Animal Instincts (2015)
programme.desc: The dark knight joins forces with a team of superheroes including Green Arrow and The Flash to battle the mastermind behind a horse of deadly robotic animals. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Chris Diamantopoulos

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets (2022)
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog fights alongside Superman in Metropolis, thwarting the evil schemes of arch-nemesis Lex Luthor. Disharmony ripples across Metropolis just as Luthors former laboratory guinea pig, Lulu, enacts her scheme to abduct the Man of Steel and members of the Justice League. Krypto temporarily loses his abilities and places his trust in a misfit team of newly superpowered animal shelter escapees to save the day. Animated comedy adventure, featuring the voices of Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart, Kate McKinnon, Vanessa Bayer and Natasha Lyonne

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie (2025)
programme.desc: Four misfits are yanked through a strange portal into a cubic realm powered by imagination. To return home, they must learn its rules and journey alongside an unlikely master crafter. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Raiders of the Lost Ark (1981)
programme.desc: Intrepid archaeologist Indiana Jones goes in search of the legendary Ark of the Covenant, a biblical artefact of devastating power. His quest leads him to Egypt, where the Nazis are plotting to use the Ark to further Hitlers plans for world domination - aided by Joness deceitful French rival. The first of five big-screen action adventures, starring Harrison Ford as Indy, with Karen Allen, Paul Freeman and John Rhys-Davies

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Spider-Man (2002)
programme.desc: A clumsy teenager develops superhuman powers after a genetically engineered spider bites him. At first his fantastic skills delight him, but his elation is severely tempered by a family tragedy, prompting him to dedicate his talents to combating evil. However, he faces a baptism of fire in the form of crazed villain the Green Goblin. Comic-book superhero adventure, with Tobey Maguire, Kirsten Dunst, Willem Dafoe, James Franco and Rosemary Harris

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull (2008)
programme.desc: The globe-trotting archaeologist teams up with a rebellious teenager who draws him into a search in the Amazon jungle for a mysterious artefact of untold power. But their quest is hindered by Soviet agents who also want the fabled object for a more sinister purpose. Action adventure sequel, starring Harrison Ford, Cate Blanchett, Shia LaBeouf, Ray Winstone and John Hurt

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Lego DC Comics Super Heroes: Justice League vs Bizarro League (2015)
programme.desc: Animated action-adventure, with the voices of Diedrich Bader and Nolan North. Superman and the Justice League team up with their Bizarro League counterparts to thwart Darkseids attempt to conquer the galaxy

programme.title: DC Super Hero Girls: Legends of Atlantis (2018)
programme.desc: Siren steals the Book of Legends to locate the Trident of Atlantis so she can reign supreme over the ocean. Animation with the voice of Yvette Nicole Brown

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Royal Autopsy
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts delves into the life and death of Anne, Queen of England from 1702 to 1714. Being the last Stuart monarch and getting pregnant at least 17 times. Despite her remarkable fecundity, Queen Anne was not able to produce an heir as most of her pregnancies resulted in miscarriages or stillbirths and none of the live births survived beyond childhood. She suffered from gout for much of her life - so much so, that she even had to be carried to her coronation at Westminster Abbey. The gout rendered her largely immobile in her latter years

Plus, the intrepid Air Force engineer who learned about evidence of UFOs at Wright Patterson Air Force Base

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Car builder Ian Roussel doubles down and builds up with an off-road project

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A hoard of golden coins are found in the prospecting district of California, and a similarly valuable find in an old piano in rural England

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Delving into the mysteries surrounding the death of Elvis Presley in 1977, investigating the theories that he remained alive, secretly, for some time afterwards

programme.title: Evidence of the Unexplained

programme.title: What on Earth?

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: A trip from New South Wales to the Western Australia metropolis of Perth. Its one of the most isolated cities in the world but, according to locals, UFO sightings are rife

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Compilation of the most compelling mysteries featured on the Ancient Aliens series

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team probes a Knight of Maltas potential Oak Island visit and captures video footage of what could be buried treasure underground

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Torrance, where Dave sees his profits grow - amongst other things. Mary finds clothes that dont fit her, which turns out to be a good thing. Plus, Kenny takes a chance at being an early bird, but winds up looking more like a dodo

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: What Came First: The Chicken or the Auction?

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts
programme.sub-title: In the Shadow of the Tor
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts embarks on an adventure across Britain to decode the truth behind its Holy Grail legends, linking Arthurian lore, sacred relics and the Knights Templar. She begins on the Isle of Wight, exploring the story of Joseph of Arimathea and the Grail. Did Joseph bury the Grail beneath the Tor? Archaeologist Cheryl Green and Dr Andrew Boakye help assess the legends historic plausibility

programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts treks across Britain, decoding the truth behind its Holy Grail legends, linking Arthurian lore, sacred relics and the Knights Templar. programme.title: Lost Grail with Alice Roberts

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

Finding themselves in a similar situation, the trio decide to take action and hit their former partners where it hurts most - their finances. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton, Maggie Smith, Dan Hedaya, Bronson Pinchot and Elizabeth Berkley

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey (2012)
programme.desc: Unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins is pulled out of his comfortable life when Gandalf the wizard volunteers him for a dangerous quest. He joins a party of dwarves who are on a mission to reclaim their lost homeland, which has been taken over by a dragon. When the group journeys into the Misty Mountains, Bilbo becomes separated from the dwarves and falls into a cave, where he finds himself confronted by Gollum and forced to play a riddle game. It is set in Middle-earth 60 years before the events of The Lord of the Rings and is the first part of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage, James Nesbitt, Ken Stott, Cate Blanchett, Ian Holm and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of Necromancer, a mysterious dark power residing in Dol Guldur with the ability to summon the spirits of the dead. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom, with Luke Evans, Evangeline Lilly and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies (2014)
programme.desc: Dwarf king Thorin reclaims control of his homeland, but his descent into madness places him on the brink of war with his human and elven allies. As Thorins Hobbit friend Bilbo tries to save the tormented ruler from himself, a vast horde of orcs gathers to destroy them all. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Martin Freeman, Richard Armitage, Ian McKellen, Luke Evans and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim (2024)
programme.desc: Helm Hammerhand sits on the throne of Rohan, flanked by sons Hama and Haleth and rebellious daughter Hera. Dunlending lord Freca proposes a marital union between Hera and his son Wulf, which Helm loudly rejects. In a subsequent brawl between fathers, Helm unintentionally lands a fatal blow, so Wulf vows revenge and amasses an army led by General Targg. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Gaia Wise, Brian Cox, Luke Pasqualino and Lorraine Ashbourne

programme.title: The Big Chill (1983)
programme.desc: Seven old friends are reunited when they gather for the funeral of a former fellow college student. Over the course of a weekend together, they reflect on the dead mans demise and how their attitudes to life have changed since they last met, reminiscing on the faded idealism of youth. Drama, starring Glenn Close, Tom Berenger, Kevin Kline, Jeff Goldblum, William Hurt and Meg Tilly

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite (2004)
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

However, their garden is currently a ramshackle spot with a treacherous patio, a troublesome lawn, a huge concrete pad and no real character. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill design and build a practical, productive space to meet the needs of the family on a £3,000 budget

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Setting out to bring in new livestock and expand the range of produce, the chef develops plans to add a regional staple, nut trees. Jumping over the border to Kent he discovers the cobnut before getting tips and tricks on growing his own. Back at the smallholding the raspberry bushes are in full bloom so he gets a helping hand harvesting before turning some into a special vinegar

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The autumn sales are over and preparations are being made for winter. In Newtonmore in Cairngorms National Park, Robert MacKenzie needs to gather in all his cows back down to the croft for pregnancy testing, while on North Uist, the MacDonalds are harvesting potatoes grown in the sandy machair soil unique to the west of Scotland

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The Barclays are finding their feet with their new business, which involves buying lambs to fatten up for the butcher. Rachel and Camy, who are one year into their tenancy, set off to market at Lairg to buy more ewes, while Nikki and Ollie find out if their favourite buffalo is pregnant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The MacDonalds walk their 150 pregnant Highland cattle from the mainland of North Uist to the tidal island of Vallay, which is accessible by foot for only a six-hour window. In the Cairngorms National Park, Jenni is planning for the year ahead with her fledgling alpaca-trekking business, and has decided a trio of pygmy goats is the perfect addition to the menagerie

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: In North Uist, Fraser and Carianne set off for the mainland to sell their rams and buy new ones ready for mating season. They dont always agree on which is best, and the best dont always prove their worth. The Barclays of South Ayrshire prepare their sheep for the Lanark Winter Show, while Nikki and Ollie begin their latest venture - farming rabbits to sell to a local hotel restaurant

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner in South Ayrshire, a deep freeze descends on Johns farm, creating havoc with the machinery and forcing him to cancel his glamping pod guests. On top of all that, imports of foreign lamb threaten profit margins for his lamb fattening business. In Moray, Nikki and Ollie pick up a big order from their local butcher. Theyre showcasing and selling their buffalo meat and other home-grown produce at a Christmas farmers market

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Hertfordshire couple Lisa and Chris dream of a child-friendly garden where they can all safely spend time together playing, growing produce and learning about nature. However, their garden is currently a ramshackle spot with a treacherous patio, a troublesome lawn, a huge concrete pad and no real character. Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill design and build a practical, productive space to meet the needs of the family on a £3,000 budget

programme.title: The Dirty Heroes (1967)
programme.desc: As the final battles of the Second World War rage, a band of ex-convicts embarks on a mission in occupied Holland to recover a cache of stolen diamonds and top secret Allied plans that have fallen into Nazi hands. Action adventure, starring Frederick Stafford, Daniela Bianchi, John Ireland and Curt Jurgens

programme.title: Sex Clinic (1972)
programme.desc: A nurse runs a clinic that secretly provides sexual services for people with unusual kinks - but she also blackmails her unwitting clients. Her carefree life is complicated by her relationship with another woman and an unexpected run-in with her estranged son. Drama, starring Georgina Ward and Alexander Davion

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumbers Mate (1978)
programme.desc: An amorous plumber runs up against assorted crooks and low-lifes while searching for a golden toilet seat. Sex comedy, starring Christopher Neil, Arthur Mullard and Elaine Paige

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: The autumn sales are over and preparations are being made for winter. In Newtonmore in Cairngorms National Park, Robert MacKenzie needs to gather in all his cows back down to the croft for pregnancy testing, while on North Uist, the MacDonalds are harvesting potatoes grown in the sandy machair soil unique to the west of Scotland

programme.desc: Following a painful adoption journey which comes to an abrupt halt, Hollyoaks star Ross Adams explores what can be done to make the system easier for LGBTQ+ adopters.

programme.desc: The return of the show in which a pair of green-fingered experts descend on gardens in desperate need of a makeover. programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: DIY expert Dave Wellman is in West Midlands, using reclaimed bricks during a masterclass in old English brickwork

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as millionaires, private collectors and antique dealers compete to buy extraordinary items. Banksy experts take a risk on a piece of wall featuring work attributed to the anonymous artist and Tommy Coopers iconic fez goes on sale. Plus, a jar of pickled pig foetuses and an array of Buzzcocks memorabilia

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as collectors bid for a pinball machine signed by Elton John, a fork liberated from Saddam Husseins palace and a prototype mid-century chair brought in by two sisters who have different feelings about it but are equally desperate to sell it. Plus a 1940s fly-o-plane fairground attraction that was once used to train fighter pilots

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: The bidders compete for two vintage Hermes handbags and a print by street artist Invader sells for 100 times what the seller paid for it. A 1970s illuminated furniture shop sign sells on the flip of a coin and a skateboard designed by Virgil Abloh goes up for sale

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: AJ Odudu hosts as buyers bid for the neon sign of a Soho sex shop and a piece of the wedding cake of William and Catherine, the Prince and Princess of Wales. Plus, one of only five remaining copies of Henry Becks redesign of the London Tube map dating back to the 1930s

programme.title: Battle of Britain: Empty Skies
programme.desc: A unique insight into what it was really like to be there. Interviews with the pilots, cut with archive footage paint the picture of one of historys greatest ever air battles

programme.title: The Assassination Bureau (1968)
programme.desc: A tenacious journalist sets out to track down a society of hired killers. However, shes taken aback by the smooth sophistication of the organisations leader. She comes up with a singularly appropriate challenge for him - but events are complicated by a conniving nobleman. Period comedy thriller, starring Diana Rigg, Oliver Reed, Telly Savalas, Curt Jurgens, Warren Mitchell and Beryl Reid

programme.title: Vendetta for the Saint (1969)
programme.desc: The suave anti-hero investigates a murder in Naples, but ends up facing the Sicilian Mafia. Action adventure, starring Roger Moore, Ian Hendry and Rosemary Dexter

programme.title: Sex with the Stars (1980)
programme.desc: A shy astrology columnist finds his life thrown into chaos when a sex-obsessed American takes over as editor and sets him an unusual assignment. He is ordered to sleep with 12 different women, one for each star sign, and write an article about each one. Comedy, starring Martin Burrows and Thick Wilson

programme.title: Au Pair Girls (1972)
programme.desc: A group of foreign girls travel to England to work as au pairs, but they are easily distracted from their new jobs by the men they meet. Comedy, starring Gabrielle Drake, Astrid Frank and Johnny Briggs

programme.desc: A desert island survival course goes wrong when the leader - a trained survival expert and ex-SAS soldier - is found dead in the forest of a remote island near Saint Marie. But with all of the course members providing one another with an alibi, how could any of them have committed the murder? Thats what new detective inspector Neville intends to find out. Starring Ralf Little

programme.desc: Comedy quiz show from 2014. Host Dara O Briain asks panellists to take an irreverent look at world events, with the Fifa World Cup in Brazil, the Commonwealth Games in Glasgow and that years referendum on Scottish independence all possible targets for satirical comment. Regulars Hugh Dennis and Andy Parsons are joined by comedians Ed Byrne, Milton Jones, Romesh Ranganathan and Katherine Ryan for a series of stand-up spots and improvised games

Starring Steve Coogan and Felicity Montagu

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.sub-title: I Know What Alan Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Alan fears a visit from the Inland Revenue may be imminent, while Sonja discovers he has lied about his close ties with rock star Bono. Steve Coogan and Amelia Bullmore star

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Poor sales see Alans book, Bouncing Back, scheduled to be pulped. However, he is somewhat consoled by his new house being finally completed. programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: US host Sean Kelly oversees bidders battling to win potential treasures found in Yeovils storage containers, lock-ups and garages. Linda has to work for her profit and tensions reach boiling point as Dan pushes Nat to her limits

programme.title: Storage Hunters UK
programme.desc: As auctioneer Sean Kelly and the team arrive in Gwent, Heavy D confuses the other bidders and himself. Meanwhile, Nat takes a gamble, but John is far from happy

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A driver is stopped attempting to smuggle 15kg of cocaine across the border, and a truck drivers modified cab attracts attention at the World Trade Bridge

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A Cuban woman crosses the bridge in the hope of being granted political asylum in America, while officers in Laredo stop three students carrying something unusual in their car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team carries out some consumer testing, taking a look at 50 family cars and whittling them down to the best three. Plus, tips on buying a delivery van on a budget, and a trip to Italy with Paddy McGuinness where he test drives the Daytona SP3, Ferraris retro-styled supercar inspired by its iconic 1960s racers

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson is in the driving seat testing two supercars - the Lamborghini Murcielago and Pagani Zonda. He is joined by co-presenters Jason Dawe and Richard Hammond as well as special guest Harry Enfield, who drives a fast lap of the Top Gear test track in a reasonably priced car

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul Whitehouse and Bob Mortimer head to Norfolk, where they attempt to ensnare a large pike - a fish that has eluded them on their trips so far. As they arrive and get their gear together, Bob introduces Paul to the surprisingly varied contents of his car boot, much to Pauls amusement. They gather their equipment and find a decent spot that should give them plenty of chances to catch and make camp for the day. They end their trip with a visit to a local pub, where Bob reveals a hidden trick

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Paul and Bob fish for brown trout on the river Test in Hampshire, using a Victorian fly-casting technique pioneered in the area as well as an authentic 19th-century rod. The Mayflies are hatching, and the famously short-lived insects inspire some thoughts on the ephemeral nature of life, and what they would do if they only had 24 hours left

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve

programme.title: Lovejoy

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The Rev Harry Nettles bets the antiques dealer that a field next to a church contains a Roman mosaic. Drama, guest starring David Kossoff, with Ian McShane and Dudley Sutton

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The gun used to kill a boxer is discovered at the scene of an armed robbery 15 years later, prompting the team to reinvestigate the case. Twenty-one-year-old Eddie Mayfair was shot dead a week after winning an important bout, which left his opponent seriously injured and unable to carry on his career. The detectives initially suspect revenge as a motive, but the case is complicated when they uncover the rivalries and money-making aspects of the sport. Guest starring Maggie ONeill (Shameless) and Chloe Howman (Casualty)

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Retired DI Frank Patterson presents the team with information regarding the getaway car used in a 30-year-old safety deposit-box robbery. They discover the former detective not only wants to convict the suspected thief of the heist and murder of his three colleagues, but also prove that a high-ranking officer was involved in the plot - jeopardising the future of Sandras Ucos unit. Phil Daniels guest stars

programme.title: Jonathan Creek
programme.desc: A widow steeped in classical mythology is alarmed to discover her nightmares predict impending murders in vivid detail, until Jonathan becomes the killers nemesis and finds a more rational explanation closer to home. Drama, guest starring Rebecca Front, with Alan Davies and Caroline Quentin

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: The Queen of Poisons: Part One
programme.desc: Adaptation of Robert Thorogoods novel about a retired archaeologist who investigates murder. When the Mayor dies in the middle of a meeting, Judith, Becks and Suzie uncover lies, scandal and blackmail. Guest starring Peter Davison

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.sub-title: The Queen of Poisons: Part Two
programme.desc: As the suspects secrets stack up, Judith, Becks and Suzie still cant find anyone with a motive to hurt the Mayor. Guest starring Peter Davison

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike and Beth take a long road trip to obtain divorce papers from his ex-wife, and Kristin and Daniel contend with the mysterious death of a man in a hotel room. Detective drama, starring Neill Rea

programme.title: Whitechapel
programme.desc: Part two of two. With the body count rising, Miles and Chandler clash over the direction of the investigation, and struggle to put aside their differences in the face of their toughest adversary to date. Counsellor Morgan Lamb is of particular interest to the team, having already survived the killers wrath, and Chandler has a vested interest in keeping her alive. Starring Rupert Penry-Jones, Phil Davis and Lydia Leonard

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. A horse trainer with money worries is found hanged, and suicide is suspected until tests reveal he was drugged shortly before his death. Lynley discovers the cove on the victims estate was used to land contraband, and connects the death to a smuggling racket, but Havers suspects the answer lies with the local riding community. Detective drama, starring Nathaniel Parker and Sharon Small

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The gun used to kill a boxer is discovered at the scene of an armed robbery 15 years later, prompting the team to reinvestigate the case. Twenty-one-year-old Eddie Mayfair was shot dead a week after winning an important bout, which left his opponent seriously injured and unable to carry on his career. The detectives initially suspect revenge as a motive, but the case is complicated when they uncover the rivalries and money-making aspects of the sport. Guest starring Maggie ONeill (Shameless) and Chloe Howman (Casualty)

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Sister Reginalds incorrigible brother Alfie Lynch, a habitual thief, turns up at the nunnery seeking help. He is put up at Mrs Clamss guest house. At an art exhibition in the local gallery, egocentric artist Gerry Ardwell features himself as the main exhibit. The next morning, Ardwell is found dead, bludgeoned by a brass statue, while a valuable painting has been stolen. Alfie Lynch is missing and DI Gillespies main suspect. Sister Reginald pleads with Sister Boniface to find the real culprit, a task made harder when the painting is found in Lynchs room and other suspects have alibis

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey argues with Darryl about the lack of trust in their relationship, and visits a therapist for advice on how to resolve the issue. Comedy, starring Linda Robson

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: Part one of two. The stage adaptation of Janes book endures numerous problems before opening night, including electrical problems, feuding cast members and a notorious arts critic writing a potentially bad review. Meanwhile, Mattie searches for new clues about her missing mother, but an onstage murder brings her to the theatre

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Smithy picks up a lead on a drug dealer operating from a burger van and before long Sun Hills uniform branch are mounting a raid on a skunk factory - where Diane puts herself in great danger by ignoring Callums orders. Back at the station, Phil and Stuart muster as much empathy and sensitivity as they can when CID are called on to sort out a love triangle and find a missing bridegroom in time for his wedding

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Acklands plans for a romantic evening at home are thrown into disarray by the arrival of a shotgun-wielding neighbour

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Proctor provokes Holmes by publicly undermining her, and the two fall out

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: With Carver missing, fears for his safety grow when a youth is arrested in possession of his credit card. Long-running drama with the bobbies and detectives at Londons Sun Hill police station

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Burnside is forced to arrest his colleague Carver on suspicion of murder

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A distant cousin of Freds who has Downs syndrome is taken in by the Buckles following the death of his protective mother, but Violet struggles to cope and Shelagh is forced to make other arrangements for his care. New recruit Valerie prepares for her first day at Nonnatus House, and Trixie comes to the aid of a pregnant woman who is in urgent need of dental treatment to avoid an infection. The nurses discover what has happened to Sister Mary Cynthia, a revelation that has distressing consequences for Sister Monica Joan

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: While the world anxiously awaits the resolution of the Cuban Missile Crisis, Valerie treats a pregnant Somali woman who has undergone female genital circumcision. The Nonnatus Team arrange for her to go into hospital, but she responds by going into hiding, and the situation is complicated further when it emerges that the womans younger sister will soon go through the same process. Sister Mary Cynthias depression is treated with electroconvulsive therapy, which she hopes will restore her faith

programme.title: Catherine Cooksons The Gambling Man
programme.desc: Robson Green stars in the title role as Rory Connor, a rent collector who spends his nights at the gaming tables, secure in the knowledge that nobody can turn a card quite like him. Unfortunately, as the stakes get higher, Connor finds himself gambling more than money - with dramatic consequences for himself and those around him. Feature-length drama, with Bernard Hill and Sylvestra Le Touzel

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Two years after crushing Napoleon at Waterloo, the Duke of Wellington sends Army officer Sharpe to India after hearing local Maharaja, Khande Rao, is threatening British interests there. However, it proves to be the rugged soldiers most dangerous mission to date. Sean Bean stars

programme.title: Sister Boniface Mysteries
programme.desc: Top television spy series Operation QT is filming at the convent when a real bullet is fired instead of a replica, narrowly missing the leading actor. Working with DS Livingstone, Sister Boniface soon works out the real target was the shows producer, Dick Lansky, who has many enemies on and off set and a roving eye for the actresses. Lorna Watson stars

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: The murder of Amir Aziz, a prominent anti-fundamentalist Muslim, drags the Lyell team into the murky world of hate-crime and counter-terrorism. Initially thought to be the work of a EDL member whose son was killed by the Taliban, the team begin to suspect the killing is connected to Sarah Begovic, a young woman who left the UK to relocate to Syria, but who recently returned home in secret with her six-month-old son. Feature-length episode of the crime drama, starring Richard Lintern

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The squad investigates a long-running feud between two family ice-cream businesses, which resulted in a shooting and several armed raids 10 years ago. Standing enlists the aid of his daughter in cracking the case, and she discovers evidence of drug dealing - but Pullman does not approve of her involvement. With Dennis Waterman and Amanda Redman, alongside guest star Jodie Kelly

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A distant cousin of Freds who has Downs syndrome is taken in by the Buckles following the death of his protective mother, but Violet struggles to cope and Shelagh is forced to make other arrangements for his care. New recruit Valerie prepares for her first day at Nonnatus House, and Trixie comes to the aid of a pregnant woman who is in urgent need of dental treatment to avoid an infection. The nurses discover what has happened to Sister Mary Cynthia, a revelation that has distressing consequences for Sister Monica Joan

programme.title: A Small Light
programme.desc: Miep fights to keep Ottos business running in the hope the Franks will return. After Amsterdams liberation, she searches for Jewish residents of the annexe. Drama, starring Bel Powley

programme.title: Art Detectives
programme.desc: Mick and Shazia visit Cornwalls famous Towan Studios where some rare rock memorabilia has been stolen and the owner killed

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: While reseaching her book on prisons, Dorien meets an incarcerated Chris on a visit to the Isle of Wight, and is promptly taken in by his criticisms of Sharon as a bad wife. Comedy, starring Lesley Joseph, Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Quinnans fiancee Jenny is surprised to discover she is part of a greyhound-owning syndicate

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: Eva confides in Ronnie that she misses Jimmi after they find common ground discussing a recent criminal case during a radio debate on modern policing. Meanwhile, Julia is concerned that the new campus surgery will not be ready in time for opening after problems with the decorators

programme.title: Doctors
programme.desc: A dead body is found in the new campus surgery just as Julia is making the finishing touches to the grand opening. As Eva leads the police in launching a murder enquiry, Jimmi asks her out for a drink and the other staff members have to fend off journalists wanting to know what has happened

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Amanda Mealing joins the cast as consultant Connie Beauchamp, who immediately gets on the wrong side of Will. Ric spends the day flirting with the new arrival - before she reminds him exactly who is in charge. Owen feels confused over Diane and Mubbs conflicting advice, while Donna comes to the rescue of a drunken and distraught Mickie, who makes a surprising confession

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victors unease at the possible outcome of a medical test is compounded by the discovery that he has just bought a car with an obscene number plate. However, it isnt until later, when he attends an amateur dramatics rehearsal at neighbour Nick Swaineys house, that things really start getting him down. Richard Wilson stars

programme.title: Yes, Prime Minister
programme.desc: Hacker is left with egg on his face when Sir Humphrey makes it known the Government plans to cut arts funding. Political comedy, starring Paul Eddington, Nigel Hawthorne and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Yes, Prime Minister
programme.desc: Jim decides to save money by getting rid of the Department of Education, much to the disgust of Sir Humphrey. Political comedy, starring Paul Eddington, Nigel Hawthorne and Derek Fowlds

programme.title: Attenborough and the Mammoth Graveyard
programme.desc: David Attenborough joins a team of archaeologists and palaeontologists excavating a mammoth graveyard discovered by fossil hunters in the prehistoric riverbed of the Thames. The site has also led to the discovery of stone artefacts, providing an insight into the relationship between early humans and mammoths during the Ice Ages. Leading experts in the fields of evolution provide their insight into this unique vision of prehistoric Britain

programme.title: Attenboroughs Wonder of Song
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines seven recordings of animals singing, all documented in his lifetime - including one he recorded himself. The songs are from species as varied as lyrebirds, lemurs and humpback whales, all providing an insight into the way these creatures communicate. The programme also examines new evidence on the purpose of singing, which challenges the long-held belief that it is a mating ritual - it has been theorised that both male and female songbirds sing as part of a survival strategy

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough has a passion for birds eggs, which protect the young from the outside world at the same time as allowing them to breathe and are strong enough to withstand the full weight of an incubating parent and weak enough to allow a chick to break free. In this documentary, the broadcaster reveals the secrets of birds eggs from creation to hatching, exploring how they are made, the reasons behind their shape and their intrinsic purpose

programme.desc: Singer Elaine Paige performs If You Dont Want My Love in a musical sketch entitled Expensive House. Plus, The Band of Slaves continues and theres a Top of the Pops-themed finale

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Attenborough and the Mammoth Graveyard
programme.desc: David Attenborough joins a team of archaeologists and palaeontologists excavating a mammoth graveyard discovered by fossil hunters in the prehistoric riverbed of the Thames. The site has also led to the discovery of stone artefacts, providing an insight into the relationship between early humans and mammoths during the Ice Ages. Leading experts in the fields of evolution provide their insight into this unique vision of prehistoric Britain

programme.title: Attenboroughs Wonder of Song
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines seven recordings of animals singing, all documented in his lifetime - including one he recorded himself. The songs are from species as varied as lyrebirds, lemurs and humpback whales, all providing an insight into the way these creatures communicate. The programme also examines new evidence on the purpose of singing, which challenges the long-held belief that it is a mating ritual - it has been theorised that both male and female songbirds sing as part of a survival strategy

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough has a passion for birds eggs, which protect the young from the outside world at the same time as allowing them to breathe and are strong enough to withstand the full weight of an incubating parent and weak enough to allow a chick to break free. In this documentary, the broadcaster reveals the secrets of birds eggs from creation to hatching, exploring how they are made, the reasons behind their shape and their intrinsic purpose

programme.desc: The arrival of Christmas brings a new set of problems for Lifeline. Drama, starring Bernard Hepton and Angela Richards

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson offers his views on the Porsche GT3 RS and Ferrari 360 Challenge Stradale, while Richard Hammond goes in search of a Dodge Charger. Katie Price - aka model Jordan - is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, and all three presenters are challenged to buy a vehicle for less than £100

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: James May pits the speed of a homing pigeon against the muscle of Fords Sportka, while Jeremy Clarkson tries to drive from London to Edinburgh and back again in an Audi A8 - on one tank of fuel. The Porsche Carrera GT is put to the test, and snooker player Ronnie OSullivan is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Bottom: Hooligans Island Live 1997 (1997)
programme.desc: Manic flatmates Eddie and Richie are marooned on a desert island - with only a nuclear bomb for company

programme.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
programme.desc: The veteran radio and TV presenter and the team host a special show dedicated to the memory of a much-cherished broadcaster. With viewers in shock, it falls to Alan to handle this delicate situation as only he can. But one mans loss is anothers opportunity. Comedy written by Rob and Neil Gibbons and star Steve Coogan, with Susannah Fielding as co-host Jennie Gresham

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Bored with life at the Linton Travel Tavern, Alan goes looking for excitement in time-honoured fashion - by getting drunk and stealing a traffic cone. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, Phil Cornwell, Sally Phillips and David Schneider

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Tony develops a sudden interest in astrology when Deborah announces her fascination with the mystical art. Meanwhile, Gary disapproves of the new pub landlords policies about lock-ins and bar tabs. Neil Morrissey, Leslie Ash and Martin Clunes star

programme.title: Hi-de-Hi!
programme.desc: Joe Maplin hatches a hare-brained scheme to stop a hospital being built next to the camp site, ordering staff to make a din from dawn till dusk while the council committee conduct an inspection visit. Jimmy Perry and David Crofts comedy, starring Ruth Madoc, Paul Shane and Su Pollard

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters meet a pregnant German woman who is in need of help, so eternal optimist Del-Boy becomes her saviour, aiming to earn himself some money into the bargain by making Marlene and Boycies dreams come true. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst, Buster Merryfield and John Challis

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: A weeping statue in the local church gives Del an idea for a money-making scheme to help a hospice under threat of closure. However, his efforts are thwarted by the weather. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: For once, Del-Boy is an innocent victim when a routine trip to the supermarket turns into a tense night as an inept robber holds the Trotters hostage, along with the manager and security guard. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Tempers flare between the Trotter brothers as they fall for the same woman - and Dels efforts to win the romance war leave his future hanging in the balance. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney and Mickey Pearce are commissioned to make a community film, but Del-Boy soon gets in on the act, offering a role to anyone who wants one - provided they pay for the privilege

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: An old friend returns from Australia flushed with success and offers Del a share in his business empire Down Under. Although the prospect is tempting, it would mean leaving Nelson Mandela House and younger brother Rodney behind. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy enters the import trade after striking a deal with Boycie to fetch a consignment of dodgy diamonds across from Holland, and ropes in Rodney and Uncle Albert to help. Their plans are jeopardised when old foe Chief Inspector Slater picks up the Trotters trail. Feature-length episode of the comedy, guest starring Jim Broadbent, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Buster Merryfield

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The run-down state of the flats in Nelson Mandela House prompts Rodney to join the residents committee, and he soon finds himself hobnobbing with council officials - a situation Del quickly exploits. Starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del falls for a glamorous antiques dealer who comes to view an old cabinet described as a Queen Anne original - but the feeling is not necessarily mutual. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: May the Force Be with You
programme.desc: Rodney unwittingly causes uproar in the Trotter household by bringing home a stranger claiming to be an old friend of Dels. Starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst, with a guest appearance by Jim Broadbent

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney tries to help a drunken woman on the street, but his good deed backfires. Fearful of a life behind bars, he promptly goes into hiding - unaware devious brother Del has set him up as a joke. Comedy, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst and David Jason

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: The Trotters embark on a venture involving the decoration of Denzils flat. When they find his wifes beloved canary lying dead in its cage, they assume responsibility and race to replace it before the deal is ruined. Comedy, with David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Lennard Pearce

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: For once, Del-Boy is an innocent victim when a routine trip to the supermarket turns into a tense night as an inept robber holds the Trotters hostage, along with the manager and security guard. Comedy, starring David Jason, Nicholas Lyndhurst and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Tempers flare between the Trotter brothers as they fall for the same woman - and Dels efforts to win the romance war leave his future hanging in the balance. Comedy, starring David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.sub-title: I Know What Alan Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Alan fears a visit from the Inland Revenue may be imminent, while Sonja discovers he has lied about his close ties with rock star Bono. Steve Coogan and Amelia Bullmore star

programme.title: Im Alan Partridge
programme.desc: Alan has the misfortune to meet his biggest fan, whose bizarre behaviour proceeds to ruin his already slender chances of landing an Irish TV series. Comedy, starring Steve Coogan, with guest appearances by Father Ted creators Graham Linehan and Arthur Mathews

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Rodney and Mickey Pearce are commissioned to make a community film, but Del-Boy soon gets in on the act, offering a role to anyone who wants one - provided they pay for the privilege

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.sub-title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: An old friend returns from Australia flushed with success and offers Del a share in his business empire Down Under. Although the prospect is tempting, it would mean leaving Nelson Mandela House and younger brother Rodney behind. David Jason and Nicholas Lyndhurst star

programme.title: Only Fools and Horses
programme.desc: Del-Boy enters the import trade after striking a deal with Boycie to fetch a consignment of dodgy diamonds across from Holland, and ropes in Rodney and Uncle Albert to help. programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletch desperately wants to get out of the tedious task of making fishing nets, and hatches a crafty scheme to get himself assigned to the library. Classic comedy, starring Ronnie Barker

programme.title: The Green Green Grass
programme.desc: To celebrate her 40th wedding anniversary, Marlene wants to renew her marriage vows with Boycie, and tries to make contact with old friends while compiling the guest list - only to receive devastating news. Comedy, starring John Challis and Sue Holderness

programme.title: Are You Being Served?
programme.desc: Pilot episode of the vintage comedy. Trouble abounds when the Ladies Department and Gentlemens Outfitting are informed they must share the same floor. John Inman, Mollie Sugden, Frank Thornton and Wendy Richard star

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: The Afterthoughts of a Co-op Manager
programme.desc: Truly discovers a former suitor of Marinas went off to Australia, and convinces her the emigrant did so to forget about her - and that she should stop seeing Howard out of respect to the other mans memory. Long-running comedy series, starring Frank Thornton, Jean Fergusson and Robert Fyfe

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part one of two. The veteran broadcaster follows life inside two prisons holding some of Americas most notorious female criminals - Indiana Womens Prison and Rockville Correctional Facility in the same US state. Among the inmates he meets in the first edition are Sarah Pender, who went on the run while serving 110 years for double murder, before being captured four months later, and Martha Search, who is looking forward to getting to grips with modern technology when her 20-year sentence comes to an end

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Part two of two. The veteran broadcaster meets more inmates inside two of Indianas most dangerous womens prisons. Among them are Dawn Hopkins, who was sentenced to life for murdering her three-month-old son, and Sarah Cindy White, who was incarcerated as a teenager and will spend the rest of her life behind bars. The journalist also hears the remarkable story of Linda Darby who, after escaping from jail in 1972, spent the next 35 years on the run - before the law finally caught up with her

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex is now one month into her training as a fertility assistant and she is finally able to work independently on the early pregnancy scan list

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex spends her first shift in Andrology learning about how they analyse and store sperm. Later, she works with a patient whose only hope of having children is by using donor eggs

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: The Bill
programme.sub-title: Too Hot to Handle - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of three. The evidence against undercover cop Stevie mounts up, suggesting she has thrown away her career for the love of a villain. Stuart finally catches up with the pair, and his suspicions are confirmed when she turns a gun on her colleague and makes her escape. With the violent Tameside Crew wreaking carnage across Sun Hill in pursuit of Towler, Stuart is suspended from duty for being too close to the case. Concludes tomorrow

programme.title: The Bill
programme.sub-title: Too Hot to Handle - Part Three
programme.desc: Part three of three. In a flashback sequence, Stevie reveals to Stuart how she discovered the drug deal was a set-up and why she disobeyed instructions in order to protect her boyfriend. Stuart is astonished that her erratic behaviour was designed to save his life and expose the real villain behind the Tameside Crew. As she makes plans to flee the country, the gang seems always to be two steps ahead of her - and Stevie still has to make the biggest decision of her life

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Mels younger brother and his girlfriend come to stay on New Years Eve and she goes to work thinking the couple are happily celebrating in Trafalgar Square - until Sun Hill officers are called to investigate a stabbing in a club. With the troublesome youngster in the frame for the attack, apparently provoked by a fellow clubber who made advances to his companion, Mel sets out to persuade her colleagues he is innocent

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: When a young mother is found badly beaten in an alleyway, Sun Hill CID is drawn into her tale of debt, blackmail and a complex love life. The victim was seen arguing with a former boyfriend in a nightclub the previous day, and DNA evidence recovered from under her fingernails leads to a man who she owed a huge amount of money to. Christopher Timothy and Duncan James guest star

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Part one of two. A couple return from a night away to discover their baby has been abducted from her bed. The childs nanny - the last person to see her - gives a garbled account of events, covering for her boyfriend who had visited on the night in question. But as Tony gently interrogates the parents, another suspect emerges

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Fly-on-the-wall documentary following Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team. A man is crushed by his own car

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Ambulance Services Hazardous Area Response Team tries to seal a major chemical spill and helps a teenager who fell down a chimney

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: Emergency services deal with the consequences of gun crime, racing to the scene when a man is shot outside a mosque

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The Hazardous Area Response Team is called to help defuse a bomb found in Wakefield, and to rescue a BMX rider who fell and fractured his spine in woods near Leeds

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Matron Steph and James treat some very sick patients on the busiest shift Steph has seen in the emergency dept, while Caitlin cares for a good Samaritan in a lot of pain

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Its Halloween and Matron Hazera is having a staffing nightmare, Matron Steph meets an abusive patient in police custody, and Amy helps deliver premature identical twins

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Patsy Palmer and Gargy Patel guest star in the comedy sketch show, featuring the comedienne as an assortment of quirky and bizarre characters. Gingers for Justice take to the skyline in a rooftop demonstration

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Paul OGrady guest stars, as Nan puts in a characteristically foul-mouthed appearance on his teatime chat show, broadcasting her horrible views to the nation. With Brian Murphy and Neil Stuke

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Sheila Hancock makes a guest appearance as Nans sister, who flies over from Spain to pay her a visit. Meanwhile, Derek gets a massage and Lauren ties the knot

programme.title: Stacey Dooley
programme.desc: Stacey Dooley meets Americans prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest. They include a family of 12 in Colorados Rocky Mountains, who have isolated themselves for the past decade

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: With access to key individuals who didnt give evidence at the trial, this documentary explores the hidden workings of the tabloids, PRs and agents connected to so-called Wagatha Christie, which followed accuisations between footballers wives Coleen Rooney and Rebekah Vardy. Contributors include Colin Paterson and Lizzie Cundy

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex has now been a trainee fertility assistant for two months and meets two couples desperately trying to start their families

programme.title: Alex Jones: Making Babies
programme.desc: Alex learns about the hormone injections that 3,000 patients a year take at Kings Fertility to prepare for IVF, and meets 34-year-old Sharlotte who is freezing her eggs

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: With Ben away, Susan decides to take her mother Grace to a cocktail night at the art gallery, but causes uproar by mistaking a dealer for a courier, and is forced to make amends by taking him out for dinner. Meanwhile, Roger finally pops the question to Abi

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Kenzos father arrives unexpectedly on the Harpers doorstep. Janey decides to grant him access, but soon regrets the decision when he fails to bring his son home. Meanwhile, an unusual request from a couple Susan and Ben met on holiday leads to a startling revelation. Starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: An elderly patient comes to the surgery for treatment and confesses to having an affair with a much younger woman - before dying in the dentists chair. To cause further confusion, the mans wife and mistress come looking for Ben, arousing Susans suspicions. Comedy, guest starring Eric Sykes

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Roger and Abi announce they have set a date for their wedding, which sets Susan thinking about what a disappointment her own big day was. She suggests to Ben they renew their marriage vows, but he is invited to one of the most important football matches of the season - which happens to be on the same day as their ceremony

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Ben tries to show moral support by driving Michael to his university interview. However, a bit of Dutch courage takes its toll on the teenager, who emerges from the meeting in a dishevelled state. Meanwhile, Susan accompanies her attractive boss on an art-buying trip

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Michael succeeds in getting the Harpers accepted to appear on The Weakest Link, but some searching questions give the familys dirty washing a good airing on national TV - not least that Susan was once married to a wrestler called Troy the Punisher. John Burgess and Rosemary Leach guest star, with Anne Robinson as herself
